channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Analysis of Election Commission Data on SIR and West Bengal Poll Results
item.description: The article intended to analyse the potential impact of the Special Investigation Report (SIR) on the results of the West Bengal elections. According to Election Commission data, there is an examinati...

item.title: Raila and Ayacko Discuss Luo and Nilotic Origins in Resurfaced Videos
item.description: A video of veteran opposition leader Raila Odinga has resurfaced, sparking renewed discussions about the Luo community's origins and broader Nilotic traditions in Kenya. Recorded in 2023 during celebr...

item.title: TMC Criticises Denial of Rabindra Jayanti Celebrations Ahead of Suvendu Adhikari Oath
item.description: As West Bengal prepares for a change in government, tensions have arisen over cultural celebrations. Suvendu Adhikari is scheduled to take oath as the new Chief Minister on Saturday at Brigade Parade ...

item.title: Jonvic Remulla announces plans to run for local office in Cavite in 2028
item.description: Jonvic Remulla, a notable political figure in the Philippines, has indicated his intention to return to his home province of Cavite and pursue a local political post in the 2028 elections. This announ...

item.title: Critical Linux Vulnerability 'Dirty Frag' Allows Root Access Across Major Distributions
item.description: A newly discovered Linux vulnerability called 'Dirty Frag' has been reported by researcher Hyunwoo Kim (@v4bel). This zero-day exploit allows attackers to gain root privileges on all major Linux distr...

item.title: Ndoyisile Sibindi’s Top Billing Audition Sparks Debate Over Foreign Nationals in SA Media
item.description: Zimbabwean-born, South African-based social media personality Ndoyisile Sibindi has caused a stir after submitting an audition for the SABC3 lifestyle show, Top Billing, which is currently searching f...

item.title: Katsina Security Forces Neutralise Bandits, Rescue 32 Kidnap Victims
item.description: For Katsina, government don report another strong operation wey security forces carry out against bandit gangs wey dey terrorize communities inside state and even parts of Kano. Commissioner for Inter...

item.title: FIA Plans Engine Adjustments for Formula One in 2027 Season
item.description: Formula One bosses don dey plan another change for the engines wey dem dey use, this time for the 2027 season. Di FIA announce say di 11 team bosses and five power unit manufacturers don reach agreeme...

item.title: DCI arrests elderly woman and recovers suspected narcotics in Nairobi
item.description: Detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) in Nairobi have apprehended a 68-year-old woman, Teresia Mwikali Amukoa, suspected of involvement in drug trafficking. The operation, l...

item.title: Tess Daly and Vernon Kay announce amicable separation after 23 years together
item.description: Tess Daly and Vernon Kay have decided to part ways after 23 years of marriage. The couple, who married in 2003, released a joint statement explaining that the decision was made after careful considera...

item.title: Cottesloe Tops List of Perth’s Most Expensive Luxury Suburbs
item.description: Cottesloe has been named Western Australia’s most expensive suburb for luxury homes for the third consecutive year, according to the latest Ray White Group Luxury Outlook. The suburb now has a median ...

item.title: Study Suggests Universe's Physical Constants Are Critical for Life at the Cellular Level
item.description: Researchers at Queen Mary University of London have proposed a groundbreaking link between fundamental physical constants and the existence of life. Their study suggests that the Universe's constants—...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari to be West Bengal CM, Vijay’s Party Secures Majority in Tamil Nadu
item.description: In a significant political development, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has announced Suvendu Adhikari as the next Chief Minister of West Bengal. The decision was taken during a legislature party mee...

item.title: Scientists Reveal Dual Role of HSL Protein in Fat Cell Health and Metabolism
item.description: Researchers at the University of Toulouse have discovered that hormone-sensitive lipase (HSL), a protein long believed to simply release stored fat for energy, has a critical second function inside th...

item.title: Wardley and Dubois Weigh In Calmly Ahead of Heavyweight Title Clash, Despite Jordan's Itauma Provocation
item.description: At the weigh-in for the highly anticipated WBO heavyweight title fight between Fabio Wardley and Daniel Dubois, held in Manchester ahead of Saturday's bout at Co-op Live, presenter Simon Jordan attemp...

item.title: Police Monitoring Unit investigates alleged involvement of senior officers in Dadiyata disappearance
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police, IGP Olatunji Rilwan Disu, don direct the Police Monitoring Unit to look into claims wey link two senior police officers, CSP Hussaini Gimba and CSP Hassan Gimba, to th...

item.title: US President Announces Temporary Ceasefire Between Russia and Ukraine
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a three-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, set to run from Saturday, May 9 to Monday, May 11, coinciding with Russia's Victory Day celebrations. The ceas...

item.title: Malema calls for immediate impeachment process following Constitutional Court ruling
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema celebrated outside the Constitutional Court in Braamfontein after the court ruled in favour of referring the Phala Phala matter back to Parliament. He announced that he would ...

item.title: Chris Mickelson set to make ACT Brumbies Super Rugby debut
item.description: Chris Mickelson, a Canberra rugby talent who has been with the Uni-Norths Owls since he was a child, is set to make his Super Rugby debut for the ACT Brumbies against the Western Force this Saturday n...

item.title: Ian Watkins faced threats and bullying in prison prior to stabbing incident, court told
item.description: Court proceedings have revealed that Ian Watkins, the former lead singer of the band Lostprophets and convicted paedophile, experienced bullying and threats from other inmates while serving his prison...
